---
title: "Lecture Slides Index"
subtitle: "POL 682: Linear Regression Analysis"
author: "Christopher Weber, PhD"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

# Course Lectures

This page provides links to all lecture materials for POL 682. Schedule follows the [course syllabus](../Syllabus.pdf).

## Quick Links

| Lecture | File | RPubs |
|---------|------|-------|
| Introduction to Linear Regression | [Introduction_to_Linear_Regression.qmd](Introduction_to_Linear_Regression.qmd) | [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874/linereg1) |
| Derivation of OLS Estimator | [ols_estimator.qmd](ols_estimator.qmd) | [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874/1390443) |
| OLS Derivation (Detailed Notes) | [OLS_Derivation.qmd](OLS_Derivation.qmd) | [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874/1390453) |
| Gauss-Markov Assumptions | [gauss_markov_slides.qmd](gauss_markov_slides.qmd) | [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874/gm_assumptions) |
| Linear Regression and Matrix Algebra | [linear_regression_matrix_algebra.qmd](linear_regression_matrix_algebra.qmd) | [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874/matrix) |
| Multiple Regression | [multiple_regression.qmd](multiple_regression.qmd) | [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874/Matrices_and_Fit) |
| Dummy Variables and Model Fit | [dummy_variables_model_fit.qmd](dummy_variables_model_fit.qmd) | |
| Interactions and Heteroskedasticity | [interactions_heteroskedasticity.qmd](interactions_heteroskedasticity.qmd) | |
| Multicollinearity | [multicollinearity.qmd](multicollinearity.qmd) | |


## Course Schedule

### Week 1: Introduction to Linear Regression
- **Topics**: The OLS estimator
- **Reading**: Fox, Chapters 2, 3 (first half)
- **Files**: [Introduction_to_Linear_Regression.qmd](Introduction_to_Linear_Regression.qmd)

### Weeks 2-4: Estimation and Properties
- **Topics**: Properties of the OLS estimator
- **Files**: [ols_estimator.qmd](ols_estimator.qmd), [OLS_Derivation.qmd](OLS_Derivation.qmd), [gauss_markov_slides.qmd](gauss_markov_slides.qmd)

### Week 5: Matrix Algebra
- **Topics**: Vectors, Matrices, and the OLS Estimator in Matrix Form
- **Files**: [linear_regression_matrix_algebra.qmd](linear_regression_matrix_algebra.qmd)

### Week 6: Multiple Regression
- **Topics**: Multiple Predictors and Matrix Algebra
- **Files**: [multiple_regression.qmd](multiple_regression.qmd)

### Week 7: Dummy Variables and Model Fit
- **Topics**: Dummy Variables, R-squared, Cross-Validation, and the Achen Debate
- **Files**: [dummy_variables_model_fit.qmd](dummy_variables_model_fit.qmd)

### Week 8: Interactions and Heteroskedasticity
- **Topics**: Categorical and Continuous Interactions, Non-Additivity, Heteroskedasticity Detection and Correction, WLS, Robust Standard Errors
- **Files**: [interactions_heteroskedasticity.qmd](interactions_heteroskedasticity.qmd)

### Week 9: Multicollinearity
- **Topics**: Perfect and Imperfect Collinearity, VIF, Bias-Variance Tradeoff, Ridge and Lasso Regression
- **Files**: [multicollinearity.qmd](multicollinearity.qmd)

## External Resources

- [Course GitHub Repository](https://github.com/crweber9874/linear_regression_class)
- [Course Notes](https://linereg.netlify.app/)
- [RPubs Collection](https://rpubs.com/crweber9874)
